positions.title: Principal AI Operations Engineer
responsibilities: Design and implement security controls and audits to maintain SOC 1 and 2 certifications
Design and implement key security controls to ensure compliance with GDPR
Develop key standards and policies for internal AI usage
Lead collaboration with other teams to develop cross-discipline policies to safely use AI tools
Build automated AI-based backend processes to gather and enrich key data used in control automation and assessments
Build and deploy MCP servers for internal and external use
Build and maintain MCP server framework and infrastructure for future development
Build and maintain RAG pipelines and vector databases for internal use
Build automated data scraping and training resources to support ongoing AI efforts

positions.title: Senior Security Engineer
responsibilities: Built automation to support the testing and operation of the SOC program
Managed annual SOC audit and created reports
Reviewed and revised existing controls
Developed additions to SOC framework based on business scope expansion
Developed AI solutions to control operation and evaluation
Reviewed test analyst work prior to submission
Conducted assessments of potential tools for use in the SOC program
Worked with SOX team to ensure ongoing compliance and find opportunities for synergy
Created control testing policies, standards, and procedures

positions.title: Internal Control Testing Lead
responsibilities: Trained and led the testing team in conducting internal control testing efforts
Consulted in the development of IT General Controls based on risk assessments
Automated GRC tasks including testing, evidence gathering, and control operation
Conducted analysis of SOX and GLBA compliance gaps
Reviewed existing controls for alignment to NIST 800-53 practices
Developed testing methodology based on best practices from NIST
Owned and conducted risk-based audits of control environments to determine effectiveness
Presented audit findings to applicable stakeholders for agreement and conclusion
Assessed and supported the closing of material findings from regulatory agents
Worked with business leaders to determine mission-supporting remediation plans
Created control testing policies, standards, and procedures
